title: Happy Pet Tough Toys Rubber Rope Ball Dog Toy Strong Fun Interactive Outdoor Chewing Playing Fetch Retrieve Durable Washable for All Breeds 2.5"

Designed for tug-of-war games, this sturdy toy helps support healthy teeth and gums while keeping your pet engaged and entertained. Its textured surface adds extra grip, making playtime even more enjoyable for both you and your pet. Perfect for both interactive play and chewing sessions.
